dependencyInputs.limitation: Package and workspace-lock bytes plus dependency realpaths are sealed. Installed dependency contents are not recursively hashed.

supersededEvidence.reason: The candidate melee-target-layer module changed; the failed point-p99 capture remains immutable historical evidence but is not pooled with the new candidate.

fixedWork.bootstrapUnit: crossed resampling of three original-order captures, three inverse-order captures, and twenty seed clusters; all four maps retained

scheduleRule.defaultOrder: AB when (seed-list index + grid-list index) is even, otherwise BA
scheduleRule.inversion: --invert-order flips every measured and warmup AB/BA pair
scheduleRule.balance: Every (seed,map) task has exactly three AB and three BA observations. Traversal pairs r0/r1, r2/r3, and r4/r5 are exact reversals.

estimator.perTask: sqrt(median(three AB candidate/baseline ratios) * median(three BA candidate/baseline ratios))
estimator.quantile: Type-7 linear interpolation at p50, p95, and p99
estimator.bootstrap: 20,000 deterministic replicates. Resample three captures with replacement inside each inversion stratum and twenty seeds with replacement; retain all four maps.
estimator.rawDataPolicy: Retain every observation. Do not trim, winsorize, selectively rerun, or remove the slowest rows.

stoppingRule.validCaptures: Run exactly r0 through r5; do not add captures after inspecting performance.
stoppingRule.hostInvalidation: Only an independently recorded, predeclared host-attestation failure may invalidate a complete capture. Retain the invalid artifact and permit at most one full-capture replacement attempt.
stoppingRule.semanticOrSourceFailure: A source, runner, profile, semantic, rejection, stuck, or exception failure ends the protocol; it is not replaceable.
stoppingRule.performanceFailure: Any failed performance gate after r5 leaves the optimization unqualified. Never rerun only a slow task.
stoppingRule.r0ExitHandling: R0 may exit nonzero after atomically writing a valid report when its legacy standalone performance gate fails. Continue only if that report exists and passes this aggregator; any pre-report failure stops the protocol.
stoppingRule.operatorAttestation: This offline aggregator cannot prove the absence of shadow attempts or establish chronology. Commit the protocol and runners before R0 and retain an external append-only attempt ledger with every artifact hash.
